name: AST SpaceMobile / AST 太空移动
summary: AST SpaceMobile 正在建设面向普通手机的空间蜂窝宽带网络，是 Starlink 直连手机与卫星宽带主题下的重要上市可比公司；其仍处于高投入与商业化推进阶段。
summaryZh: AST SpaceMobile 正在建设面向普通手机的空间蜂窝宽带网络，是 Starlink 直连手机与卫星宽带主题下的重要上市可比公司；其仍处于高投入与商业化推进阶段。
summaryEn: AST SpaceMobile is building a space-based cellular broadband network for standard mobile phones, making it a public comparable for Starlink direct-to-device and satellite-broadband themes; it remains in a heavy-investment commercialization phase.

updateCadence.最新动态: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每 12 小时
updateCadence.财务与公告: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每日

updateCadence.供应链溯源: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周

business.overview: 公司聚焦通过卫星与移动网络运营商合作，为普通手机提供空间蜂窝宽带覆盖。
business.overviewZh: 公司聚焦通过卫星与移动网络运营商合作，为普通手机提供空间蜂窝宽带覆盖。
business.overviewEn: The company focuses on space-based cellular broadband coverage for standard phones through satellites and mobile-network-operator partnerships.

segments.name: SpaceMobile 星座网络
segments.description: 建设卫星星座、地面网关与网络能力，目标是让普通手机直接连接卫星。
segments.descriptionZh: 建设卫星星座、地面网关与网络能力，目标是让普通手机直接连接卫星。
segments.descriptionEn: Builds satellites, gateways, and network capability intended to connect standard mobile phones directly to satellites.

segments.name: 移动运营商合作
segments.description: 与移动网络运营商合作推进覆盖、频谱和商业化。
segments.descriptionZh: 与移动网络运营商合作推进覆盖、频谱和商业化。
segments.descriptionEn: Works with mobile network operators on coverage, spectrum, and commercialization.

business.description: 公司聚焦通过卫星与移动网络运营商合作，为普通手机提供空间蜂窝宽带覆盖。
business.descriptionZh: 公司聚焦通过卫星与移动网络运营商合作，为普通手机提供空间蜂窝宽带覆盖。
business.descriptionEn: The company focuses on space-based cellular broadband coverage for standard phones through satellites and mobile-network-operator partnerships.
revenueModel: SpaceMobile 星座网络 / SpaceMobile network
移动运营商合作 / MNO partnerships
business.thesis: AST SpaceMobile 正在建设面向普通手机的空间蜂窝宽带网络，是 Starlink 直连手机与卫星宽带主题下的重要上市可比公司；其仍处于高投入与商业化推进阶段。
business.thesisZh: AST SpaceMobile 正在建设面向普通手机的空间蜂窝宽带网络，是 Starlink 直连手机与卫星宽带主题下的重要上市可比公司；其仍处于高投入与商业化推进阶段。
business.thesisEn: AST SpaceMobile is building a space-based cellular broadband network for standard mobile phones, making it a public comparable for Starlink direct-to-device and satellite-broadband themes; it remains in a heavy-investment commercialization phase.
riskNotes: 商业化仍在推进，收入序列未作为趋势图使用。
星座建设和融资节奏会影响执行风险。

supplyChain.thesis: AST SpaceMobile 的关键上游来自卫星制造、相控阵/射频载荷、半导体、地面网关与发射服务；原材料层主要包括太阳能电池/电子材料、铝钛结构材料和复合材料。
supplyChain.thesisZh: AST SpaceMobile 的关键上游来自卫星制造、相控阵/射频载荷、半导体、地面网关与发射服务；原材料层主要包括太阳能电池/电子材料、铝钛结构材料和复合材料。
supplyChain.thesisEn: AST SpaceMobile's key upstream inputs include satellite manufacturing, phased-array/RF payloads, semiconductors, ground gateways, and launch services; raw-material layers include solar-cell/electronic materials, aluminum/titanium structures, and composites.

tiers.title: Critical upstream inputs

entities.name: 卫星、发射与地面网络供应链
entities.nameZh: 卫星、发射与地面网络供应链
entities.nameEn: Satellite, launch, and ground-network supply chain
entities.relationship: 支撑卫星平台、入轨服务、地面站/网关、网络运营和服务可用性；具体企业需合同披露后逐项确认。
entities.relationshipZh: 支撑卫星平台、入轨服务、地面站/网关、网络运营和服务可用性；具体企业需合同披露后逐项确认。
entities.relationshipEn: Supports satellite platforms, access to orbit, ground stations/gateways, network operations, and service availability; specific companies should be confirmed contract by contract when disclosed.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于供应链上游或配套服务层，对交付和成本有影响，但短期瓶颈属性需继续核实。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于供应链上游或配套服务层，对交付和成本有影响，但短期瓶颈属性需继续核实。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in an upstream or supporting-service layer and can affect delivery and cost, but near-term bottleneck attributes need further verification.

entities.name: 终端、天线、射频与通信模组供应链
entities.nameZh: 终端、天线、射频与通信模组供应链
entities.nameEn: Terminal, antenna, RF, and communications-module supply chain
entities.relationship: 终端设备、天线、调制解调器、射频部件和通信芯片模组是连接服务落地的关键投入。
entities.relationshipZh: 终端设备、天线、调制解调器、射频部件和通信芯片模组是连接服务落地的关键投入。
entities.relationshipEn: Terminals, antennas, modems, RF components, and communications chip modules are key inputs for connectivity services.

relationshipStrength.label: 强相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于制程设备或检测量测层，需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂和封装产线扩产传导。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in process equipment or metrology/inspection, with demand transmitted through foundry, memory, and packaging line expansion.

downstream.thesis: ASTS 处于卫星通信中游，面向移动网络运营商和最终手机用户提供覆盖能力；与 Starlink 的交集在卫星直连手机与全球覆盖主题。
downstream.thesisZh: ASTS 处于卫星通信中游，面向移动网络运营商和最终手机用户提供覆盖能力；与 Starlink 的交集在卫星直连手机与全球覆盖主题。
downstream.thesisEn: ASTS sits in the midstream satellite-communications layer, offering coverage capability to mobile network operators and end phone users; its overlap with Starlink is in direct-to-device and global-coverage themes.

tiers.title: Customers and end markets
tiers.notes: 按公司披露的业务场景归类，非完整客户名单。
tiers.notesZh: 按公司披露的业务场景归类，非完整客户名单。
tiers.notesEn: Grouped by disclosed business use cases, not a full customer list.

entities.name: 移动网络运营商
entities.relationship: 运营商可将 ASTS 覆盖能力嵌入其移动服务；具体收入贡献需以后续披露为准。
entities.relationshipZh: 运营商可将 ASTS 覆盖能力嵌入其移动服务；具体收入贡献需以后续披露为准。
entities.relationshipEn: Operators may embed ASTS coverage capability into mobile services; specific revenue contribution depends on future disclosures.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 应用或运营客户能影响订单和收入可见度，但与核心供给瓶颈相比传导更长。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Application or operator customers can affect orders and revenue visibility, but the transmission is longer than core supply bottlenecks.

entities.name: 普通手机用户
entities.relationship: 目标是让现有手机在无地面覆盖区域获得连接。
entities.relationshipZh: 目标是让现有手机在无地面覆盖区域获得连接。
entities.relationshipEn: The goal is to provide connectivity to existing phones outside terrestrial coverage.

relationshipStrength.label: 弱相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The downstream demand relationship helps identify application direction, but it is usually weaker than upstream critical supply and manufacturing bottlenecks.

tiers.title: SpaceX / Starlink theme link
tiers.notes: 用于 IPO 主题归类，不代表披露的直接商业关系。
tiers.notesZh: 用于 IPO 主题归类，不代表披露的直接商业关系。
tiers.notesEn: Used for IPO-theme classification, not as a disclosed direct commercial relationship.

entities.name: SpaceX / Starlink
entities.relationship: 两者均暴露于卫星直连手机和全球连接市场，适合用于 IPO 主题可比分析。
entities.relationshipZh: 两者均暴露于卫星直连手机和全球连接市场，适合用于 IPO 主题可比分析。
entities.relationshipEn: Both are exposed to direct-to-device satellite connectivity and global coverage markets, making ASTS relevant for IPO-theme comparison.

relationshipStrength.label: 弱相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 下游需求关系有助于判断应用去向，但相关性通常弱于上游关键供给和制造瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The downstream demand relationship helps identify application direction, but it is usually weaker than upstream critical supply and manufacturing bottlenecks.

news.title: ASTS 披露 2026 年一季度 10-Q
news.titleZh: ASTS 披露 2026 年一季度 10-Q
news.summary: Q1 2026 净亏损为 1.91012 亿美元，总资产为 60.51141 亿美元。
news.summaryZh: Q1 2026 净亏损为 1.91012 亿美元，总资产为 60.51141 亿美元。
news.summaryEn: Q1 2026 net loss was $191.012 million and total assets were $6.051141 billion.
news.impact: 为 Starlink 直连手机主题提供上市公司商业化投入强度参照。
news.impactZh: 为 Starlink 直连手机主题提供上市公司商业化投入强度参照。
news.impactEn: Provides a public-company benchmark for investment intensity in the Starlink direct-to-device theme.

news.title: FY2025 净亏损扩大
news.summary: FY2025 净亏损为 3.4194 亿美元，FY2025 年末总资产为 50.14387 亿美元。
news.summaryZh: FY2025 净亏损为 3.4194 亿美元，FY2025 年末总资产为 50.14387 亿美元。
news.summaryEn: FY2025 net loss was $341.94 million and year-end total assets were $5.014387 billion.
news.impact: 显示项目仍处于资本密集型建设阶段，估值分析应强调融资与执行风险。
news.impactZh: 显示项目仍处于资本密集型建设阶段，估值分析应强调融资与执行风险。
news.impactEn: Shows the project remains in a capital-intensive buildout phase; valuation analysis should emphasize funding and execution risk.
